ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to train the model (e.g., full_log, full_gbr) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used (e.g., logistic regression, gradient boosting) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used to train the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the metrics are for */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "average_abs_odds_difference_race" REAL /* Average absolute odds difference across race */,
  "average_abs_odds_difference_sex" REAL /* Average absolute odds difference across sex */,
  "balanced_acc" REAL /* Balanced accuracy of the model */,
  "between_all_groups_theil_index_race" REAL /* Between all groups Theil index across race */,
  "between_all_groups_theil_index_sex" REAL /* Between all groups Theil index across sex */,
  "between_group_coefficient_of_variation_race" REAL /* Between group coefficient of variation across race */,
  "between_group_coefficient_of_variation_sex" REAL /* Between group coefficient of variation across sex */,
  "between_group_generalized_entropy_index_race" REAL /* Between group generalized entropy index across race */,
  "between_group_generalized_entropy_index_sex" REAL /* Between group generalized entropy index across sex */,
  "coefficient_of_variation_race" REAL /* Coefficient of variation across race */,
  "coefficient_of_variation_sex" REAL /* Coefficient of variation across sex */,
  "equal_opportunity_difference_race" REAL /* Equal opportunity difference across race */,
  "equal_opportunity_difference_sex" REAL /* Equal opportunity difference across sex */,
  "generalized_entropy_index_race" REAL /* Generalized entropy index across race */,
  "generalized_entropy_index_sex" REAL /* Generalized entropy index across sex */,
  "theil_index_race" REAL /* Theil index across race */,
  "theil_index_sex" REAL /* Theil index across sex */,
  "true_positive_rate_difference_race" REAL /* True positive rate difference across race */,
  "true_positive_rate_difference_sex" REAL /* True positive rate difference across sex */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fairness_metrics" (
  "fairness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fairness metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the fairness metrics are for */,
  "average_abs_odds_difference_race" REAL /* Average absolute odds difference across race */,
  "average_abs_odds_difference_sex" REAL /* Average absolute odds difference across sex */,
  "between_all_groups_theil_index_race" REAL /* Between all groups Theil index across race */,
  "between_all_groups_theil_index_sex" REAL /* Between all groups Theil index across sex */,
  "between_group_coefficient_of_variation_race" REAL /* Between group coefficient of variation across race */,
  "between_group_coefficient_of_variation_sex" REAL /* Between group coefficient of variation across sex */,
  "between_group_generalized_entropy_index_race" REAL /* Between group generalized entropy index across race */,
  "between_group_generalized_entropy_index_sex" REAL /* Between group generalized entropy index across sex */,
  "coefficient_of_variation_race" REAL /* Coefficient of variation across race */,
  "coefficient_of_variation_sex" REAL /* Coefficient of variation across sex */,
  "equal_opportunity_difference_race" REAL /* Equal opportunity difference across race */,
  "equal_opportunity_difference_sex" REAL /* Equal opportunity difference across sex */,
  "generalized_entropy_index_race" REAL /* Generalized entropy index across race */,
  "generalized_entropy_index_sex" REAL /* Generalized entropy index across sex */,
  "theil_index_race" REAL /* Theil index across race */,
  "theil_index_sex" REAL /* Theil index across sex */,
  "true_positive_rate_difference_race" REAL /* True positive rate difference across race */,
  "true_positive_rate_difference_sex" REAL /* True positive rate difference across sex */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the fairness metrics were evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fairness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fairness_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic group */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the demographic group (e.g., race, sex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_demographics" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic group */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the demographic group for the model (e.g., percentage of White individuals in the dataset) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bias_metrics" (
  "bias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bias metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the bias metrics are for */,
  "disparate_impact_ratio" REAL /* Disparate impact ratio of the model */,
  "statistical_parity_difference" REAL /* Statistical parity difference of the model */,
  "equalized_odds_difference" REAL /* Equalized odds difference of the model */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the bias metrics were evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bias_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bias_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
